name: common-orchestration-runtime-static-graph
title: Common Orchestration Runtime Static Graph
description: 将静态 WorkflowGraph 编译后的 OrchestrationPlanSnapshot 接入 common orchestration runtime，用 LifecycleRun.orchestrations[] 作为 runtime snapshot/journal/projection 事实源，并收敛旧 Activity runtime 读取路径。
